ios.//: Customer-supplied: Apple. ascAppId = App Store Connect app id (numeric); appleTeamId = 10-char Apple Developer Team ID. Provide the Apple ID via `eas submit` prompt or EXPO_APPLE_ID env / EAS secret.

android.//: Customer-supplied: Google. serviceAccountKeyPath = path to the Google Play service-account JSON with the 'Service Account User' + release permissions. track = internal | alpha | beta | production.
